queries.question: Give me the name of the industry each business reporter is in.
queries.sql: SELECT Industries.name  from Business_Reporters_Industries join Industries on Business_Reporters_Industries.industryID = Industries.industryID join Business_Reporters on Business_Reporters_Industries.businessReporterID = Business_Reporters.reporterID   GROUP BY Business_Reporters_Industries.industryID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Business_Reporters_Industries.businessReporterID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Business_Reporters)

queries.question: Give me the name of the industry each business reporter is in.
queries.sql: select business_reporters.fullname , industries.name from Business_Reporters_Industries join Industries on Business_Reporters_Industries.industryID = Industries.industryID join Business_Reporters on Business_Reporters_Industries.businessReporterID = Business_Reporters.reporterID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name WHERE {
  ?business_reporters_industries a :Reporters_Industries .
  ?industries a :Industries .
  ?business_reporters_industries p:industryID ?industryid_l .
  ?industries p:industryID ?industryid_r .
  ?business_reporters a :Business_Reporters .
  ?business_reporters_industries p:businessReporterID ?businessreporterid_l .
  ?business_reporters p:reporterID ?reporterid_r .
  ?business_reporters p:name ?fullname .
  ?industries p:name ?name .
  FILTER(STR(?industryid_l) = STR(?industryid_r))
  FILTER(STR(?businessreporterid_l) = STR(?reporterid_r))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the name of the industry each business reporter is in.
